_description: Claude session reference: patient ID assignments per E2E test. Claude reads this before running or writing any E2E test. Do NOT hardcode pid = 'PX' inside test files — always derive it from this file.

test_e2e_acceptance.scenario: Full acceptance — all 7 tests, all stages accept/fill/approve (FD → Phlebo → Accession → LT → Doctor)

test_e2e_p2_rejection.scenario: 3-cycle rejection — accession rejects Serum, LT rejects 24h urine, doctor resamples LFT; final partial_approve

test_e2e_p3_partial_approve.scenario: Partial pipeline — phlebo 3/4 ON (no 24h urine), accession 2/3 (WB+Serum), LT 1/2 (Serum only, saves RFT+LFT), doctor approves RFT+LFT

test_e2e_p4_rectification.scenario: Full acceptance + doctor rectification — all 7 tests accepted, doctor rectifies RFT and LFT

test_e2e_p5_relative_acceptance.scenario: Select existing relative Sunita Kumari Mishra (Wife, 35F) on account 8839900148 — full acceptance all 7 tests
test_e2e_p5_relative_acceptance.patient: Sunita Kumari Mishra (relative of Aditya Kumar Mishra), 8839900148

test_e2e_p6_rejection.scenario: 3-cycle rejection — accession rejects Urine, LT rejects Serum, doctor resamples CBC; final full approve

test_e2e_p7_limit_error.scenario: Add-relative limit error — search 8839900148, click Add Relative, assert error: 'The patient limit has been reached. A maximum of 10 patients is allowed per number'

test_e2e_p11_duplicate_mobile_error.scenario: Duplicate mobile error — new patient form for Mr Rajesh Kumar with mobile 9999999999 (already registered); verify error on Next and pass

test_e2e_p12_relative_acceptance.scenario: Add relative Vikram Kumar Mishra (Brother, 32M) to account 7777777777 — full acceptance all 7 tests, doctor rectifies RFT and LFT
test_e2e_p12_relative_acceptance.patient: Vikram Kumar Mishra (relative of Aditya Kumar Mishra), 7777777777

test_e2e_p13_partial_rejection.scenario: Partial rejection — accession rejects Serum, LT rejects 24h urine; doctor approves all. Local date 16/04/2026.

test_e2e_p8_new_patient_acceptance.scenario: New patient full acceptance — Priya Sharma (Mrs, 28F), mobile 8900000010, all 7 tests, all stages accept/fill/approve

test_e2e_p9_new_patient_rejection.scenario: New patient 3-cycle rejection — Rohan Desai (Mr, 35M), mobile 8900000011; accession rejects Serum, LT rejects 24h urine, doctor resamples LFT; final full approve

test_e2e_p10_new_patient_partial.scenario: New patient partial rejection — Kavita Nair (Mrs, 42F), mobile 8900000012; accession rejects 24h urine, full LT, doctor approves all + rectifies LFT

test_e2e_p14_partial_approve.scenario: New patient partial approve — Sanjay Mehta (Mr, 50M), mobile 8900000013; 3 tests only (CBC+RFT+LFT); LT fills partial params; doctor partial_approve all 3

_patient_summary.scenario: Full acceptance — all 7 tests, all stages (FD→Phlebo→Acc→LT→Doctor)
3-cycle rejection — Acc:Serum → LT:24h urine → Dr:LFT resample → partial_approve
Partial pipeline — phlebo 3/4, acc 2/3, LT 1/2 (Serum), Dr approves RFT+LFT
Select existing relative Sunita Kumari Mishra (Wife, 8839900148) — full acceptance, all 7 tests
3-cycle rejection — Acc:Urine → LT:Serum → Dr:CBC resample → full approve
Add-relative limit error — 10-patient cap reached on 8839900148
New user Priya Sharma (8900000010) — full acceptance, all 7 tests
New user Rohan Desai (8900000011) — 3-cycle rejection → LFT resample → full approve
New user Kavita Nair (8900000012) — Acc:24h urine, full LT, Dr approve all + rectify LFT
Duplicate mobile error — new patient form with 9999999999 (already registered)
Add new relative Vikram Kumar Mishra (Brother, 7777777777) — full acceptance + Dr rectify RFT+LFT
Partial rejection — Acc:Serum, LT:24h urine, Dr approves all (no doctor resample)
New user Sanjay Mehta (8900000013) — 3 tests (CBC+RFT+LFT), partial LT params, Dr partial_approve

_usage_note: When adding a new E2E test: (1) add an entry here with patient_id + scenario, (2) read patient_id from this file when referencing it — never write pid = 'PX' directly in .py files. P1–P4 are different visits for Aditya Kumar Mishra (primary). P5 is a relative on account 8839900148. P6 is Aditya with 3-cycle rejection. P7 tests the 10-patient limit error. P8–P10 are new users. P13 is Aditya with local date 16/04/2026.
